race.comment: CELERITY (10) brings strong Vic numbers across and gets in light with the key booking of J Melham. Heavily supported last start on the Heath, only to just come up short but finished full of running. Drawn perfect and will have every chance. PRAIRIE FLOWER (1) hasn't won for over a year now but is still racing as well as ever and has been knocking on the door in some strong races. Freshened with 37 days and has jumped out strongly in-between. Will be breathing down their necks when they sprint. LINGANI (4) is building nicely and is set to peak in an obvious target for her. Is a distance specialist that is sure to make her presence felt. THUNDER SHOC (7) has progressed sharply through her grades this time in, highlighted last start when finish second in the LR City Of Marion Stakes here. No reason she can't run well again. Impossible to knock the form of MIC DROP (8), who keeps stepping up to the mark. Needs to go up another rung or two but deserves her chance.
